projectDescription: A Node.js tool that automatically generates a Rojo project file (default.project.json) by scanning your Luau source tree and mapping files to their correct Roblox service locations.
keyFeatures: Auto-generates default.project.json from your Luau source tree
Maps files to ServerScriptService or ReplicatedStorage based on naming conventions
Watch mode via chokidar for continuous regeneration on file changes
Blacklist support to exclude directories from tree generation
publicApiSurface: npm run build:rojo — generate default.project.json once
npm run watch:rojo — watch src/ and regenerate on changes
BLACKLISTED_DIRS — array of directories to exclude from tree
getVirtualPath(filepath) — maps a file path to its Roblox virtual location
